name: Soft Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter (or use margarine) and cream it with 2 cups of sugar in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, and 1 teaspoon of cardamom.
4. Alternate adding this dry mixture to the butter mixture with milk.
5. In a small bowl, combine the remaining sugar and cardamom.
6. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into balls and dip them in the sugar mixture.
7. Place the coated dough balls on greased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned but not overbaked.
9. Cool the cookies on wire racks.
